title: Logical error: 'persistent_components.format_version == metadata_object->getValue<int>(f_format_version)''
description:
### Describe the bug
Upgrading the Iceberg format version using Spark gives issues in ClickHouse.
### How to reproduce
Run [spark.py](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22185488/spark.py) with `spark.py create` to create the table.
The load it in ClickHouse:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/t0/test/t0', format = 'Parquet');
SELECT c0 FROM t0; --gets 10 random numbers
```
Then run `spark.py` again with `spark.py alter`.
Then try to read again in ClickHouse:
```sql
SELECT c0 FROM t0; --Logical error
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'persistent_components.format_version == metadata_object->getValue<int>(f_format_version)'.
<Fatal> : Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. ci/tmp/build/./src/Common/StackTrace.cpp:395: StackTrace::StackTrace() @ 0x0000000014507b64
1. ci/tmp/build/./src/Common/Exception.cpp:56: DB::abortOnFailedAssertion(String const&) @ 0x0000000014461cd5
2. ci/tmp/build/./src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergMetadata.cpp:240: DB::IcebergMetadata::update(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&) @ 0x0000000019acd4a2
3. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/DataLakeConfiguration.h:378: DB::DataLakeConfiguration<DB::StorageLocalConfiguration, DB::IcebergMetadata>::updateMetadataIfChanged(std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) @ 0x0000000017ae3c9a
4. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/DataLakeConfiguration.h:90: DB::DataLakeConfiguration<DB::StorageLocalConfiguration, DB::IcebergMetadata>::update(std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, bool, bool) @ 0x0000000017ae1b1f
5. ci/tmp/build/./src/Storages/ObjectStorage/StorageObjectStorage.cpp:298: DB::StorageObjectStorage::updateExternalDynamicMetadataIfExists(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) @ 0x0000000019920fa0
6. ci/tmp/build/./src/Analyzer/Resolve/IdentifierResolver.cpp:203: DB::IdentifierResolver::tryResolveTableIdentifier(DB::Identifier const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&) @ 0x000000001abac553
7. ci/tmp/build/./src/Analyzer/Resolve/IdentifierResolver.cpp:217: DB::IdentifierResolver::tryResolveTableIdentifierFromDatabaseCatalog(DB::Identifier const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&) @ 0x000000001abacd53
8. ci/tmp/build/./src/Analyzer/Resolve/QueryAnalyzer.cpp:1660: DB::QueryAnalyzer::tryResolveIdentifier(DB::IdentifierLookup const&, DB::IdentifierResolveScope&, DB::IdentifierResolveContext) @ 0x000000001a8fac05
9. ci/tmp/build/./src/Analyzer/Resolve/QueryAnalyzer.cpp:4593: DB::QueryAnalyzer::initializeQueryJoinTreeNode(std::shared_ptr<DB::IQueryTreeNode>&, DB::IdentifierResolveScope&) @ 0x000000001a916250
10. ci/tmp/build/./src/Analyzer/Resolve/QueryAnalyzer.cpp:5949: DB::QueryAnalyzer::resolveQuery(std::shared_ptr<DB::IQueryTreeNode> const&, DB::IdentifierResolveScope&) @ 0x000000001a8e2914

12. ci/tmp/build/./src/Analyzer/Resolve/QueryAnalysisPass.cpp:18: DB::QueryAnalysisPass::run(std::shared_ptr<DB::IQueryTreeNode>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) @ 0x000000001a8e0f8e
13. ci/tmp/build/./src/Analyzer/QueryTreePassManager.cpp:188: DB::QueryTreePassManager::run(std::shared_ptr<DB::IQueryTreeNode>) @ 0x000000001a947e93
14. ci/tmp/build/./src/Interpreters/InterpreterSelectQueryAnalyzer.cpp:165: DB::buildQueryTreeAndRunPasses(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST> const&, DB::SelectQueryOptions const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IStorage> const&) @ 0x000000001b517be7

16. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__memory/unique_ptr.h:634: std::__unique_if<DB::InterpreterSelectQueryAnalyzer>::__unique_single std::make_unique[abi:se190107]<DB::InterpreterSelectQueryAnalyzer, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context> const&, DB::SelectQueryOptions const&>(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context> const&, DB::SelectQueryOptions const&) @ 0x000000001b518e70
17. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x000000001b4a486b
18. ci/tmp/build/./src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1528: DB::executeQueryImpl(char const*, char const*, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum, std::unique_ptr<DB::ReadBuffer, std::default_delete<DB::ReadBuffer>>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::ImplicitTransactionControlExecutor>) @ 0x000000001b81f96c
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, value) VALUES (1, 10.5), (2, 20.0), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2 (ref_id INTEGER, description VARCHAR);
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.description FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t1.value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Upgrading Iceberg format version using Spark causes logical error
